seoDescription: Review dryAPI service terms, usage obligations, and platform responsibilities.

elements.text: Our terms are written to support predictable operations for teams deploying AI features into commercial environments.

hero.heading: Terms Of Service
hero.body: These terms define the responsibilities, acceptable use boundaries, and service conditions for dryAPI customers.

sections.title: Customer And Platform Obligations
sections.body: The terms outline responsibilities needed for secure, lawful, and reliable service usage.

cards.title: Acceptable Use
cards.description: Use the platform for lawful workloads and maintain account security.

cards.title: Billing And Credits
cards.description: Understand payment timing, balances, and usage-based deductions.

cards.title: Service Changes
cards.description: Track updates and deprecations through changelog and notices.

sections.title: Risk, Support, And Resolution
sections.body: The agreement includes operational support pathways and dispute-handling mechanisms.

cards.title: Support Boundaries
cards.description: Understand response expectations and escalation channels.

cards.title: Service Reliability
cards.description: Follow deployment best practices to reduce avoidable incidents.

cards.title: Legal Coordination
cards.description: Engage with us for enterprise procurement and compliance review.

contactPanel.heading: Need terms review support?
contactPanel.body: We can help your legal and procurement teams evaluate terms for enterprise adoption.
contactPanel.responseTime: Legal review support in one business day
